context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses tessl skill lint to validate a skill, identifies an invalid version string in tile.json, fixes the issue, and re-runs lint until the skill is clean. Graded by inspecting tile.json and process.md.

checklist.name: Lint command run
checklist.description: process.md mentions running `tessl skill lint` on the skill path

checklist.name: Initial error captured
checklist.description: process.md documents an error or failure from the initial lint run

checklist.name: Version fixed
checklist.description: skills/webhook-sender/tile.json version is now a valid semver string (x.y.z), not '0.1'

checklist.name: Semver format correct
checklist.description: The corrected version in tile.json has exactly three dot-separated integer components

checklist.name: Lint re-run after fix
checklist.description: process.md mentions running lint a second time after applying the fix

checklist.name: Lint passes
checklist.description: process.md indicates the tile is valid after the fix (e.g. contains 'is valid' or 'passed')

checklist.name: Both files noted
checklist.description: process.md mentions both SKILL.md and tile.json as files to stage or commit

checklist.name: Fix described
checklist.description: process.md describes what was changed to resolve the lint error
